seoTitle: Lark Hill vs Lavelle — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lark Hill and Lavelle. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lark Hill vs Lavelle: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lark Hill and Lavelle.
heading: Lark Hill vs Lavelle — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lark Hill, Queensland and Lavelle, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lavelle has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Lark Hill (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lark Hill or Lavelle safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lark Hill has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Lavelle scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lark Hill scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Lavelle scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lark Hill or Lavelle?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lavelle has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
